positive: A stylized celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) silhouette, depicted in a dynamic, mid-air leap, surrounded by swirling nebula effects and bioluminescent floral mandalas. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, with the fox forming the central point of focus. Use a vibrant, saturated color palette emphasizing deep sapphire blues, ethereal golds, and pops of neon magenta. The style should be highly detailed graphic novel illustration mixed with Art Nouveau aesthetics, rendered as a clean, high-contrast vector print suitable for apparel. Crisp lines, strong negative space around the figure, golden ratio composition, centered subject, cosmic energy trails, intricate linework.
negative: text, writing, signature, logo, watermark, blurry, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, lowres, artifacts, disfigured, cartoonish, photorealistic, sketch, gradient, messy, illegible
